use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF 'OFF' EPISODES IN PATIENTS WITH PARKINSON'S DISEASE

indications.text:
KYNMOBI is indicated for the acute, intermittent treatment of “off” episodes in patients with
Parkinson’s disease (PD).

KYNMOBI is indicated for the acute, intermittent treatment of “off” episodes in patients with
Parkinson’s disease (PD).
